s289_verification.architecture_clarification: activate-by-email flow is 'no codes, no keys, no files' by-design (activate-by-email.ts:1-4). Primary persistence = localStorage + KV server-side. SQLite license_cache is used ONLY by legacy Ed25519 manual JSON-paste flow (LicenseManager.tsx textarea). S289 prompt criteria 'SQLite license_cache populated' was architectural mismatch — corrected here.

safety_suite.note: S288: FSAF-01..04 verified via signed-webhook POST diretto worker test (HMAC-SHA256 + Stripe UA). KV invariata 7 keys pre+post. FSAF-05/09 esistenti S286.

FSAF-05.name: webhook_idempotency_resend
FSAF-05.note: KV singleton by-design garantisce idempotency. Side-bug Resend email re-send su resend = backlog FSAF-09.

FSAF-09.name: webhook_email_dedupe_on_resend
FSAF-09.method: Early-return su KV session:{id} exists in stripeWebhook handler (riga 332-352 post-tier detection). Vitest test 'FSAF-09: resend of already-processed session skips email re-send' asserisce resendCalls=1 invariato post-replay. Live verify: resend evt_1TaIfzIW4bHDTsaHilob7QmV --webhook-endpoint we_1TaI32IW4bHDTsaHT0wtsmJ4 → KV created_at invariato 2026-05-23T17:03:11.614Z → pending_webhooks=0 (handler ritorna 200 idempotent_replay).
FSAF-09.fix_commit: S286 fluxion-proxy/src/routes/stripe-webhook.ts +14 righe early-return + dedupe const sessionKey

FSAF-01.name: card_decline_generic
FSAF-01.method: POST /api/v1/webhook/stripe with signed payment_intent.payment_failed payload (last_payment_error.code=card_declined, decline_code=generic_decline)
FSAF-01.behavior: Handler default-deny by-construction: only checkout.session.completed triggers KV write. All other events ack 200 senza side-effect. NO purchase created, NO email sent.

FSAF-02.name: card_decline_insufficient_funds
FSAF-02.behavior: Idem FSAF-01: ack 200 senza processing. NO retry storm (Stripe non resend 2xx).

FSAF-03.name: dispute_created_fraudulent
FSAF-03.gap_identified: Handler NON processa charge.dispute.created (default-deny ack only). NO founder admin alert email su dispute creato → backlog BACKLOG-DISPUTE-ALERT: implementare admin notification via Resend admin-resend.ts route quando dispute received. Severity medium (Stripe Dashboard email native exists ma slow).

FSAF-04.name: amount_tampering_resistance
FSAF-04.method: POST signed checkout.session.completed con amount_total=999 cents (NON match Base 49700 né Pro 89700) + customer_email=attacker_fsaf04@example.com
FSAF-04.behavior: detectTier() in stripe-webhook.ts riga 333 ritorna null per amount fuori whitelist {49700, 89700}. Handler return warning unknown_tier + NO KV write + NO email send. KV verify post-attempt: purchase:attacker_fsaf04@example.com NOT EXISTS.

data_quality_suite.note: S288: FDQ-03 cross-checked via S279 vitest + S280 integration tests + S286 KV refund infra. FDQ-04 simulated charge.dispute.closed status=lost. FDQ-02 SCA 3DS skipped (founder browser challenge required).

FDQ-01.name: checkout_success_card_4242_or_coupon100
FDQ-01.method: S286 retry: coupon 100% (BMStvGos) + price_1TRrGpIW4bHDTsaHtlcqzrSR + customer_email=fluxion.gestionale@gmail.com (Resend account owner)
FDQ-01.previous_attempt_s285_result: PASS_PARTIAL (email_sent=false root cause = test+s285@example.com non-owner Resend sandbox)

FDQ-03.name: refund_propagation_client_side
FDQ-03.method: Cross-check S279 vitest phone-home.test.ts (S279 gap fix coverage refunded=true email mixed case → status=revoked) + S280 integration_license_revoke.rs 5/5 PASS (test_sync_revoked_persists_status_and_tier_to_db, test_sync_ok_is_noop, test_sync_rejects_invalid_status_string, test_sync_revoked_is_idempotent, test_sync_expired_and_invalid_also_propagate) + S286 KV refund infrastructure (purchase:fluxion.gestionale@gmail.com tier=base, refunded=false placeholder, dedupe FSAF-09 verified).

FDQ-04.name: dispute_resolution_closed_lost
FDQ-04.gap_identified: Handler NON auto-revoke licenza su dispute lost. Founder deve manualmente eseguire /api/v1/refund flow per propagare refunded=true → phone-home status=revoked. Backlog BACKLOG-DISPUTE-AUTO-REVOKE: implementare auto-update KV purchase[refunded]=true on charge.dispute.closed status=lost. Severity medium-high (financial leak se cliente perde dispute ma resta operativo).
